name: Thai Spicy Sausage (Sai Grog) Hkrt62b
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Chopped coriander roots or leaves
1 teaspoon Finely chopped KAFFIR lime leaf
1 Thread or string to close ends
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl and set aside.
2. Fill pork mixture into casing using a teaspoon. Close the ends by tying every 5 inches along the filled casing.
3. Before grilling, make a small pinhole on either side of the sausage to prevent bursting during cooking.
4. Grill on the barbecue grill outside or in an oven broiler until brown and juicy.
5. Serve hot with cooked sticky rice or warm cooked rice.
